productDisplayName: Nike Men Manu Train Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Blue crew neck jersey made of 100% polyester, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and manchester united badge appliquéd on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Manchester United's woven club crest appears at the left chest of this jersey. And, this jersey has finished hems to prevent fraying and deliver a polished look. Lightweight and breathable, the Manchester United Away Training Jersey is designed with the environment in mind; its sweat-wicking mesh Dri-Fit fabric has been made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles. Dri-FIT fabric helps keep you dry and comfortable by wicking sweat away from the skin to the fabric's surface, where it quickly evaporates. The Manchester United Training men's Soccer Jersey pays homage to decades of tradition and success with bold colours, unique style details and breathable comfort on and off the field.
